2606.03635.title: VidMsg: A Benchmark for Implicit Message Inference in Short Videos
2606.03635.paper_summary: Understanding short online videos involves more than identifying visible objects and actions; video makers often include an underlying message or purpose in the clip. We introduce VidMsg, a benchmark for evaluating implicit message understanding in short, internet-native video clips. VidMsg contains 400 YouTube-derived clips across 9 practical topic areas and 52 fine-grained target messages, covering domains such as career and finance, education, health and well-being, culture, safety, sustainability, and lifestyle. VidMsg is constructed through a message-first pipeline: an LLM first translates target messages into indirect search scenarios, which are used to retrieve candidate clips. Human annotators then retain clips that convey the intended message without being overly explicit. VidMsg is designed primarily for bidirectional message-clip retrieval for scalable applications such as video search and recommendation, where systems must capture holistic video understanding. In addition to retrieval, VidMsg includes a diagnostic multiple-choice QA benchmark, where models select the intended message of a clip from semantically related alternatives. Experiments with contemporary video-language and retrieval models show that strong models often fail on VidMsg, because the task requires pragmatic inference, integration of contextual cues, and discrimination among semantically close messages. We also introduce VidVec-Msg, a baseline method that improves message-oriented retrieval while leaving substantial headroom for future work.
2606.03635.paper_summary_zh: 了解短小的在線視頻不僅僅是識別可見的物體和行為；視頻製作者通常會在片段中包含潛在的訊息或目的。<lb/>我們介紹了VidMsg，這是一個用於評估短小、網絡原生視頻片段中隱含訊息理解的基準。<lb/>VidMsg包含來自YouTube的400個片段，涵蓋9個實用主題領域和52個細緻的目標訊息，涉及職業和財務、教育、健康與福祉、文化、安全、可持續性和生活方式等領域。<lb/>VidMsg是通過一個以訊息為先的流程構建的：一個大型語言模型首先將目標訊息轉換為間接搜索場景，這些場景用於檢索候選片段。<lb/>然後，人類標註者保留那些傳達預期訊息但不過於明確的片段。<lb/>VidMsg主要設計用於雙向訊息-片段檢索，以支持可擴展的應用，如視頻搜索和推薦，這些系統必須捕捉整體視頻理解。<lb/>除了檢索，VidMsg還包括一個診斷性的多選題問答基準，模型需從語義相關的選項中選擇片段的預期訊息。<lb/>與當代視頻-語言和檢索模型的實驗顯示，強大的模型在VidMsg上經常失敗，因為這項任務需要實用推理、上下文線索的整合以及在語義相近的訊息之間的區分。<lb/>我們還介紹了VidVec-Msg，一種基準方法，改善了以訊息為導向的檢索，同時為未來的工作留出了相當的發展空間。
2606.03635.author: Issar Tzachor et.al.
2606.03635.authors: Issar Tzachor, Michael Green, Rami Ben-Ari
